# _no_channels_empty_state

> Part of [[brightbean-studio|Brightbean Studio]] — captured by /janus-brain.

_Extracted from `brightbean-studio/templates/calendar/partials/_no_channels_empty_state.html` on 2026-05-14._

{% comment %} Shared empty state shown when no social accounts are
connected in the workspace. Expects: workspace (with workspace.id). {%
endcomment %}

<div class="text-center py-16 px-6">

<div class="mx-auto mb-6 w-[335px] max-w-full">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>
